system.description: You know how to use smaller ranged weapons effectively. These include bows, crossbows, fire lances, and short bows. When you attack with such a weapon, make a Small Ranged Skill roll against your opponent's Evade. On a Success, roll Damage Dice against the Target's Hardiness based on the weapon.
system.source: Wandering Heroes of Ogre Gate, Chapter 1: Skills
